_notes: Web endpoint returns results under web.results. description is optional. extra_snippets optional array of up to 5 extra excerpts.

results.title: Transformers in Machine Learning - A Complete Guide
results.description: Transformers are a type of neural network architecture designed to handle sequential data and have become the dominant approach in NLP tasks.
extra_snippets: The transformer model was introduced in the paper Attention Is All You Need in 2017.
Self-attention allows the model to look at other words in the input sequence when encoding a specific word.

results.title: What Are Transformers? - NVIDIA Developer
results.description: NVIDIA explains the transformer architecture and why it revolutionized deep learning for NLP and beyond.
extra_snippets: Transformers power the latest generation of large language models like GPT-4 and Gemini.

results.title: Hugging Face Transformers Library
results.description: The HuggingFace Transformers library provides thousands of pretrained transformer-based models for NLP, vision, and audio.
